25.kj: I beseech (pray) thee (you), go to, now, oh.
25.dv: a primitive particle of incitement and entreaty, which may usually be rendered;

25.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
25.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

25.gl: to push forward, in various senses (literal or figurative, transitive or intransitive)
25.kj: break out, come (mightily), go over, be good, be meet, be profitable, (cause to, effect, make to, send) prosper(-ity, -ous, -ously).

25.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
25.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

25.dv: or אָנָּה; apparent contracted from H160 (אַהֲבָה) and H4994 (נָא);

26.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
26.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

26.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
26.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

26.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
26.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

26.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
26.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

26.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
26.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

27.gl: a horn (as projecting); by implication, a flask, cornet; by resemblance. an elephant's tooth (i.e. ivory), a corner (of the altar), a peak (of a mountain), a ray (of light); figuratively, power
strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
27.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

27.gl: to yoke or hitch; by analogy, to fasten in any sense, to join battle
27.kj: bind, fast, gird, harness, hold, keep, make ready, order, prepare, prison(-er), put in bonds, set in array, tie.

27.gl: to be (causative, make) luminous (literally and metaphorically)
27.kj: [idiom] break of day, glorious, kindle, (be, en-, give, show) light (-en, -ened), set on fire, shine.

27.gl: something intwined, i.e. a string, wreath or foliage
27.kj: band, cord, rope, thick bough (branch), wreathen (chain).
27.dv: or עֲבוֹת; or (feminine) עֲבֹתָה; the same as H5687 (עָבֹת);

27.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
27.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

28.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
28.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

28.gl: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands)
28.dv: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand;

28.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
28.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

28.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
28.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

28.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
28.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

29.gl: good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun, both in the masculine and the feminine, the singular and the plural (good, a good or good thing, a good man or woman; the good, goods or good things, g
29.kj: beautiful, best, better, bountiful, cheerful, at ease, [idiom] fair (word), (be in) favour, fine, glad, good (deed, -lier, -liest, -ly, -ness, -s), graciously, joyful, kindly, kind

29.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
29.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

29.gl: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands)
29.dv: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand;

29.gl: kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty
29.kj: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

29.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
29.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
